title: DisableMending
description: Simple lightweight plugin to disable mending on your server.
body:
**DISABLEMENDING**
- ✅ lightweight
- ✅ configurable disabled mending info
- ✅ on/off option and plugin reload

Config.yml:

```
# -----------------------
# DisableMending config file
# author: aphonix
# discord: https://discord.gg/zYVtWxEar8
# -----------------------

DisableMending: true
DisableMendingMessage: "&d&l[DM] &7Mending is disabled on this server."

# -----------------------
# Commands:
# /dm reload - reload config
# -----------------------
# -----------------------
# Permisions:
# dm.reload - reload plugin
# dm.notify.off - remove DisableMendingMessage
# -----------------------
```
